status: exact full-effective-domain Bellman barrier and finite integer core for one synchronized carried x-parallel secant channel; not a global cursor-transfer lemma, occupancy/birth closure, connector-availability bound, or unconditional theorem

canonical_run.command: env OPENBLAS_NUM_THREADS=1 OMP_NUM_THREADS=1 MKL_NUM_THREADS=1 VECLIB_MAXIMUM_THREADS=1 NUMEXPR_NUM_THREADS=1 nice -n 15 python3 -B design/x_axis_universal_bellman.py run --output /tmp/x-axis-universal-bellman-canonical-v2.json

repeat_audit.second_run_reason: The proof boundary was tightened to exclude unrelated chronological anchor jumps.
only_json_differences: missing_for_a_universal_safety_automaton gained the explicit unrelated-anchor exclusion
proof_boundary.not_proved gained the explicit unrelated-cursor exclusion

universal_bellman_certificate.edge_key: (source step s, child step t, exact lateral prefix control c)
universal_bellman_certificate.transport: z_child = B(z_parent-c), with B^T S B=9S
universal_bellman_certificate.postfixed_inequality: U_s >= ||c||_S + U_t/3 on every full-domain edge
universal_bellman_certificate.consequence: If ||z_parent||_S>U_s for this synchronized carried line, then ||z_child||_S-U_t >= 3(||z_parent||_S-U_s)>0.
universal_bellman_certificate.arbitrary_switching_role: Allowing every deduplicated edge at every step is an overapproximation for exterior invariance; it does not preserve whole-word or realized-path correlations.

finite_integer_core.finiteness_reason: The minimum Euclidean eigenvalue of S is 6/7, so ||(y,z)||_S<=U implies y^2+z^2<=(7/6)U^2.

proved_by_finite_computation: Every word in the pinned 124 effective connector domains was scanned in authoritative order.
Every exact source-step, ordered-child-step, and lateral-prefix-control edge was retained before deduplication.
A rational postfixed barrier holds on every resulting edge, so the exterior is invariant for one synchronized carried x-line.
The corresponding fixed-direction integer core is finite and was exhaustively enumerated.
Every connector-interior lateral class that could be affected by an x-parallel line lies inside that promoted core.
not_proved: Singleton occupancy, insertion-driven births of new x-lines, and exact axial collision provenance.
Whole-word action correlation and coexistence on one realized ordered path.

Transfer of far-line offsets when the chronological stitch cursor changes to an unrelated anchor; this is a translation without the checked factor-three expansion and can bring a discarded line back into the core.
Non-x secants, endpoint-on-candidate-line poison, positive connector availability, or a greatest safety fixed point.
referee_interpretation.smallest_next_exact_test: Retain the whole selected connector word and add capped x-line occupancy n_a(z) in {0,1,2} plus separate collision data on this finite core. Test insertion births and all ordered child slots exactly. In parallel, seek a birth-shell/address ranking for unrelated-anchor cursor changes; without that extra state the finite core is not a global far-secant automaton.
